name: CGPA Calculator
description: A comprehensive tool for university students to calculate semester Grade Point Average (GPA) and Cumulative GPA using a weighted credit system optimized for 10-point scales.

name: EMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Equated Monthly Installments (EMI) with precision. Ideal for planning home, car, or personal loans with instant breakdown of interest and principal components.

name: Percentage Calculator
description: An essential math utility to find percentages, calculate percentage increases or decreases, and determine the ratio between two numbers with speed and accuracy.

name: Age Calculator
description: Discover your exact age down to the day. This tool calculates the total years, months, and days from your date of birth, perfect for official forms and personal milestones.

name: BMI Calculator
description: Monitor your health with our Body Mass Index (BMI) calculator. It provides immediate health category results based on World Health Organization (WHO) standards for weight and height.

name: Discount Calculator
description: A must-have tool for shoppers. Instantly calculate the final discounted price and total savings for any item by entering the original price and the discount percentage.

name: YouTube Title Generator
description: Generate high-CTR, viral YouTube titles instantly. Our smart logic creates attention-grabbing headlines based on your topic and audience.
promptTemplate: Generate 5 viral YouTube titles for a video about {topic} targeting {audience} in {style} style.

name: Grammar Fixer
description: Elevate your writing with our AI Grammar Fixer. Professional corrections for assignments, emails, and articles to ensure clarity and perfect punctuation.
promptTemplate:
Fix the grammar, spelling, and clarity of the following text while maintaining a {tone} tone:

{text}

name: Story Generator
description: Unleash your creativity with AI-powered storytelling. Generate unique short stories for kids, assignments, or creative projects.
promptTemplate: Write a 300-word {genre} story about {char} with a theme of {theme}.

name: Code Commenter
description: Save time on documentation. Our smart logic adds professional comments to your code snippets to explain logic and flow.
promptTemplate:
Add technical, professional comments to this {language} code:

{snippet}

name: Resume Summary
description: Craft an impactful professional profile instantly. Our smart generator analyzes your skills to create a standout resume summary.
promptTemplate: Write a professional resume summary for {name}, a {degree} graduate with {skills} skills aiming for a {goal} role.

name: Study Plan Generator
description: Get a personalized study schedule instantly. Just enter your subject, days available, and level to get a structured plan.
promptTemplate: Create a study plan for {subject} over {days} starting from {level} level.

name: Study Task Manager
description: Stay organized and productive. A simple, persistent tool to track your daily study goals and academic tasks.

name: GPA Predictor
description: Simulate your future CGPA. See what grades you need in your current semester to reach your targets precisely.

name: Daily Motivation
description: Fuel your study sessions with handpicked motivational quotes. Keep your focus sharp and your goals in sight.
